description: Sweep `print()` and `logger.debug` left over from incident investigations (per project_cleanup_tasks memory). Specifically scrub `app/routes/wormholes.py`. Also drop the stale `db` param on `_client_for(char, db)` in `app/routes/dashboard.py:500`. Keep useful entries (perf timings, error context with traceback) — drop only diagnostic-only noise. No behavioral change.
title: Remove leftover debug logging
